column2: The crochet wide band bikini top
column3:
The bikini top of the season. Our crochet wide band bikini top features double-layered fabric and a stylish wide band cut for the ultimate flattering fit. It’s a fresh, feminine piece with a touch of effortless beach club charm.

With its delicate crochet detailing and flattering silhouette, this bikini is made to turn heads whether you’re lounging poolside or soaking up the sun. It’s the staple piece you’ll be reaching for again and again all summer long.

  • Thick double layered quality lycra
  • Stretchy fabric, slip on style
  • Bow style design, ruched strap detail
  • Wide band straps for that ultra flattering fit
  • Pair with our matching wide band bikini bottoms



Model measurements:

Holly is 5’5 and wears a size 4
Bust: 32A
Waist: 23’’
Hips: 34’’
Dress size: 4-6
